# Barsys Happy Hour

> NYC's premier AI-powered corporate cocktail event service.

Barsys Happy Hour provides full-service corporate happy hour experiences in New York City using AI cocktail machines, professional bartenders, premium spirits, and complete setup and cleanup.

## Key Facts
- Service area: New York City (Manhattan, Brooklyn, metro area)
- Team size: 50–250 guests per event
- Packages: Classic ($50/person), Signature ($70/person), Reserve ($200/person)
- All-inclusive: spirits, mixers, glassware, ice, AI machines, bartenders, setup, cleanup
- Rating: 4.7 stars from 144 reviews
- 200+ corporate clients served
- 50,000+ cocktails made
- Contact: fareed@barsys.com | (917) 679-3938

## Pages
- Homepage: https://happyhour.barsys.com/
- Shop (cocktail machines & accessories): https://happyhour.barsys.com/shop.html
- Privacy Policy: https://happyhour.barsys.com/privacy-policy.html
- Terms of Service: https://happyhour.barsys.com/terms-of-service.html

## Event Types
- Recurring office happy hours (2x/month program)
- One-time corporate events and celebrations
- Team building cocktail experiences
- Product launches and client entertainment
- Holiday parties and milestone celebrations

## Neighborhoods Served
Midtown, FiDi, Chelsea, SoHo, Flatiron, Hudson Yards, DUMBO, Williamsburg, and all Manhattan and Brooklyn neighborhoods

## Notable Clients
TikTok, Netflix, BuzzFeed, Wilhelmina, Flyhouse Agency

## FAQ
- What size events? 50–250 guests; larger events with additional machines and staff.
- What's included? Spirits, mixers, garnishes, glassware, ice, AI machines, bartenders, setup, cleanup. No hidden fees.
- Non-alcoholic options? Yes — mocktails at every event.
- Recurring program? Two managed happy hours per month with dedicated account manager.
- Can we try one event first? Yes — no commitment required.
- Service areas? All Manhattan and Brooklyn neighborhoods.
- How far in advance to book? Two weeks recommended; recurring members get priority.
- Cancellation policy? 7+ days full refund; 48-72 hours 25% fee; same-day reschedulable within 30 days.
- Insurance? Full liability insurance for every event.
- Custom menus? Signature and Reserve tiers include custom options.
- Guest count changes? Adjustable up to 48 hours before; billed for final count.
- Building coordination? We handle delivery logistics, elevator reservations, and facilities.

## Products
- Barsys 360: Automatic cocktail machine, $279.99, 6 ingredient stations, 2,000+ recipes, Bluetooth 5.0
- Coaster 2.0: Smart cocktail coaster, $49.99, LED guidance, built-in digital scale, Bluetooth 5.1
- Shaker Pro: Smart cocktail shaker, $40.00, illuminated base, app-connected, step-by-step guidance

## Company
Barsys Technologies, Inc.
New York, NY
